---
title: "ephys4"
output: github_document
---

## Read, plot and analyse ephys data

The ephys4 package facilitates reading HEKA Patchmaster files into an R session, extract and plot single traces or complete series, and perform analyses on them.  




```{r setup, include=FALSE}
devtools::load_all()
library(ephysdata)
```

```{r}

list.files("./testthat/_snaps/plots/", full.names = T) %>% knitr::include_graphics()
```


```{r}

list.files("./testthat/_snaps/add_cursors_n_bars/", full.names = T) %>% knitr::include_graphics()
```
